name: refactor_003_path_handling_consolidation
description: Centralize workspace path normalization used by bundle, scanner, registry, and reporting paths.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this remains a refactor because the task is to replace repeated path normalization with one shared utility while preserving CLI, registry, and reporting behavior. The weakness addressed was a too-tidy two-call-site setup; the hardened version adds internal consumers and a path-format contract script so one-call-site refactors no longer pass.
mutability_notes: Extra interaction added: registry keys and reporting output now depend on the same canonical path display. Shallow solutions that update only bundle/scanner or preserve mixed separators in one path are now caught by hidden checks and the targeted contract script.
